variants: Bhavna Chhabra graduated from Silverpine Music Academy, where she fostered her artistic talents. In her professional career, she works for Umber Bell Shipping, employing her expertise in Malay spelling to streamline operations. Her dedication to environmental causes is exemplified by her role as Eco-Event Coordinator at Finchfall Park, where she organizes community initiates. Moreover, her written contributions have been published by Amber Tangle Editions, showcasing her depth as a creator. Through both her job and volunteer efforts, Bhavna actively engages with and enriches her community.
